headline: U.S. Bank Launches New Loan Product for Startup Dental and Veterinary Practices
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, May 11, 2026--U.S. Bank is expanding its healthcare business banking offerings with a new startup loan product for dentists and veterinarians, giving clinicians a new option to build independent practices and serve patients in their communities.
